overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student character in a black and yellow house robe walking through a snowy gothic castle courtyard. The character traverses open courtyards, ascends stone staircases, walks through covered cloisters with pointed arches, and approaches the main entrance of the castle while other students walk through the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered castle courtyard with gothic architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy courtyard toward the castle main building

notable_agents.action: student in dark robe walking ahead toward the castle

entered.detail: large gothic castle with multiple spires and snow-covered rooftops dominating the background
snow-covered stone pavement with circular patterns
ornate stone balustrades lining the courtyard edges
leafless trees covered in snow flanking the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide, snow-covered castle courtyard with the gothic main building visible in the distance. The character walks forward across the snowy stone pavement, passing snow-covered trees and stone railings while following another student toward the castle.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard pathway with circular stone pattern approaching stairs

events.description: begins ascending stone stairs toward upper terrace level

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs following other students toward the upper level

notable_agents.action: student walking alongside on the right side
student walking ahead up the stairs

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the castle entrance
decorative circular stone inlay in the courtyard pavement

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a more crowded courtyard section with a circular stone pattern on the ground, then begins ascending the main stone staircase. Other students walk alongside and ahead, with the castle facade drawing closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior stone staircases between castle walls

events.description: moving into shadow cast by upper castle walls, reducing direct light

agents.ego_description: climbing multiple flights of exterior stone stairs toward upper terrace

notable_agents.action: student continuing up stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: stone balconies and upper level walkways visible above
tall pointed spires of the castle towers against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone staircases between high castle walls, moving into shadow. The view of the lower courtyard with trees is left behind as the character climbs toward the upper terrace level with spires visible against the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cloister walkway with pointed arches

events.description: enters covered cloister with gothic arches from open terrace

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway with gothic arches on both sides

entered.detail: covered walkway with ornate pointed gothic arches and stone columns
thick stone pillars supporting the arched ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered cloister walkway with ornate gothic arches and stone columns. The space is sheltered from the weather, with views through the arches to the outside as the character moves toward the main entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle main entrance with large wooden doors

events.description: exits cloister and approaches main castle entrance doors

agents.ego_description: approaching and reaching the large wooden main doors of the castle

notable_agents.action: student sitting on steps near the entrance

entered.detail: massive wooden doors with iron studs and grid pattern at the castle entrance
ornate stone archway framing the main entrance with icicles hanging

segments.scene_description: Exiting the cloister, the character approaches the castle's main entrance with massive wooden doors and ornate stone archway. The lighting becomes darker in the shadow of the entrance, and the character reaches the doors to enter the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, snow-covered castle courtyard into the shadowed depths of the main entrance. It begins with the character walking across snowy stone pavement past frosted trees, following another student toward the distant gothic facade. As the path leads through a crowded circular courtyard, the camera ascends a series of stone staircases, shifting from the open brightness of the lower grounds into the narrow shadows of high castle walls. The scene then transitions into a semi-covered cloister walkway, where ornate gothic arches and stone columns shelter the character from the weather. Finally, the camera moves out of the cloister and into the deepening shade of a massive stone archway, coming to a stop at the castle's heavy wooden doors.
